crime.value: Potential break-in with bloodied glass shards found in apartment
crime.quote: Shards of glass lay shattered across the floor... stained red with what looked to be blood

closed_world.value: Protagonist's apartment in LA where she lives alone
closed_world.quote: I was stuck in a crappy apartment... who needs peace and quiet when there is possibly a killer lurking in my home

investigator.value: First-person narrator, aspiring writer living alone who discovers the suspicious evidence
investigator.quote: I was an aspiring author living in LA... My mind was racing with possible scenarios

red_herring.value: Initial assumption that protagonist cut herself breaking a glass earlier
red_herring.quote: maybe I had knocked a glass earlier opening the cupboard and cut myself in the process

clue_fairness.value: Glass shards with blood drops presented directly to reader through protagonist's observation
clue_fairness.quote: The shards were stained red with what looked to be blood, just a few drops but enough to be visible

social_world.value: Struggling writer in LA - economic vulnerability and social isolation
social_world.quote: stuck in a crappy apartment, working at a job I hated for minimum wage

media_and_audience.value: Story framed through crime show consumption and genre awareness
media_and_audience.quote: SCREAM QUEENS (tommy), Sherlock, Elementary, Poirot, Miss Marple, CSI..., NCIS

investigator_wound.value: Writer's block and creative vulnerability disrupted by potential danger
investigator_wound.quote: I was just settling into a great mind set that was clearing my writers block, when I was suddenly distracted
